title: Delhi HC seeks replies from Arvind Kejriwal, others in criminal contempt case for remarks against Swarana Kanta Sharma J.
description: The Delhi High Court on Tuesday issued notice to Arvind Kejriwal, Manish Sisodia, Sanjay Singh and other Aam Aadmi Party (AAP) leaders on a suo motu contempt of court plea for their alleged "defamatory and vilifying" remarks against Justice Swarana Kanta Sharma. A Bench of Justices Navin Chawla and Ravinder Dudeja said,"The proceedings have been initiated on the basis of the order date May 14.
